global.description: The ad features a warm color palette with a clear focus on delivery services.
global.main_message: Promoting a food delivery service with a clear call to action.

elements.label: PlateSprint logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'PlateSprint' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main body text
elements.description: A prominent text area displaying the message 'Your cravings, delivered' in a large, clear font.

elements.label: Delivery information
elements.description: Text indicating delivery details, styled in a smaller font beneath the main body text.

elements.label: Delivery offer
elements.description: A smaller text area that mentions a delivery offer, positioned near the center of the ad.

elements.label: Price information
elements.description: Text displaying the price '€19.90' in a bold font, emphasizing the cost of the service.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Order now' in a contrasting color, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: Background design
elements.description: A soft, gradient background that complements the text and logo, enhancing the overall aesthetic.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small decorative element that adds visual interest but does not convey specific information.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: Another small decorative element, possibly an icon or graphic, enhancing the design.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small graphic element that adds to the visual composition without specific meaning.

elements.description: A small circular element that serves a decorative purpose in the layout.

elements.description: A small circular element that adds to the overall design without conveying specific information.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small circular element that contributes to the visual appeal of the ad.

elements.label: Main background area
elements.description: The main area of the ad that contains the text and logo, featuring a warm color palette.

elements.label: Ad headline
elements.description: The headline 'PlateSprint' is prominently displayed at the top, setting the theme of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, warm and inviting, delivery service, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main body text is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
